ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 在下方指定的文件夹中

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 与当前文件相同的文件夹

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 在当前文件夹的子文件夹中

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Auto-generate Wikilinks for [[links]] and [[images]] instead of Markdown links and images. Disable this option to generate Markdown links instead.
ast.target: 为 [[链接]] 和 [[图片]] 自动生成 Wikilinks，而不是 Markdown 链接和图片。禁用此选项则改为生成 Markdown 链接。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: What links to insert when auto-generating internal links.
ast.target: 自动生成内部链接时插入哪种链接。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Choose how to name the imported attachments, using the following variables as a placeholder:
ast.target: 选择导入附件的命名方式，使用以下变量作为占位符：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Note that the file extension of the imported attachments is preserved.
ast.target: 请注意，导入附件的文件扩展名将被保留。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Choose the date format for the placeholder ${date} in the attachment name, based on
ast.target: 选择附件名称中占位符 ${date} 的日期格式，基于

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Where newly added attachments are placed.
ast.target: 新添加的附件放置位置。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Place newly created attachment files, such as images created via drag-and-drop or audio recordings, in this folder.  Use the following variables as a placeholder:
ast.target: 将新创建的附件文件（例如通过拖放创建的图片或录音）放置在此文件夹中。使用以下变量作为占位符：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot open the attachment folder. The user must first select a markdown note.
ast.target: 无法打开附件文件夹。用户必须先选择一个 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether files that are dragged and dropped into the editor should be moved or copied. Alternatively, the user is asked each time. By holding the shift key ⇧ pressed, you will be shown the import panel, however you configured this option.
ast.target: 选择拖放到编辑器中的文件是移动还是复制。或者，每次都会询问用户。按住 Shift 键 ⇧，无论您如何配置此选项，都会显示导入面板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether files that are copy and pasted into the editor should be moved or copied. Alternatively, the user is asked each time.  By holding the shift key ⇧ pressed, you will be shown the import panel, however you configured this option.
ast.target: 选择复制粘贴到编辑器中的文件是移动还是复制。或者，每次都会询问用户。按住 Shift 键 ⇧，无论您如何配置此选项，都会显示导入面板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to import multiple files: as a bulleted list, as a numbered list, or inline without using lists.
ast.target: 选择导入多个文件的方式：作为项目符号列表、编号列表，或不使用列表直接内联。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, the filename of the imported document is used as the display text. This option is ignored when                     the previous option applies.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，导入文档的文件名将用作显示文本。当上一个选项适用时，此选项将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, the extension of the imported file is not included in the displayed text.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，导入文件的扩展名不会包含在显示文本中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a list of extensions separated by comma (e.g.: .md, .pdf) for which the default Obsidian behavior applies instead of opening the file in the default external application.
ast.target: 输入以逗号分隔的扩展名列表（例如：.md, .pdf），对于这些扩展名，将应用默认的 Obsidian 行为，而不是在默认外部应用程序中打开文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, when you right click on a Wikilink in your note, an 'Delete file'                 will be shown in the context menu.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，当您右键单击笔记中的 Wikilink 时，上下文菜单中将显示“删除文件”选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, when you rename/move an note, if the renamed note has an attachment folder connected to it,                 its attachment folder is renamed/moved to a new name/location corresponding to the new name of the note.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，当您重命名/移动笔记时，如果重命名的笔记有连接的附件文件夹，其附件文件夹将被重命名/移动到与笔记新名称对应的新名称/位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, when you delete a note, if the deleted note has an attachment folder connected to it,                 its attachment folder will be deleted as well.                 Note: automatic deletion only works when the name of the attachment folder contains ${notename}.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，当您删除笔记时，如果删除的笔记有连接的附件文件夹，其附件文件夹也将被删除。注意：仅当附件文件夹的名称包含 ${notename} 时，自动删除才有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the user is asked each time whether to delete the attachment folder.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次删除附件文件夹时都会询问用户。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, the attachment folders will not be shown.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，附件文件夹将不会显示。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Whether to move or copy files that are drag-and-dropped?
ast.target: 拖放的文件是移动还是复制？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Whether to move or copy files that are copy-and-pasted?
ast.target: 复制粘贴的文件是移动还是复制？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use the selected text for the displayed text:
ast.target: 使用选定文本作为显示文本：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use the filename for the displayed text:
ast.target: 使用文件名作为显示文本：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide the extension in the filename for the displayed text:
ast.target: 在文件名中隐藏扩展名以用于显示文本：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open attachments with default external application:
ast.target: 使用默认外部应用程序打开附件：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show option in context menu to delete attachment files:
ast.target: 在上下文菜单中显示删除附件文件的选项：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Rename the attachment folder automatically and update all links correspondingly:
ast.target: 自动重命名附件文件夹并相应更新所有链接：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete the attachment folder automatically when the corresponding note is deleted:
ast.target: 删除对应笔记时自动删除附件文件夹：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ask confirmation before deleting the attachment folder:
ast.target: 删除附件文件夹前要求确认：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: File Explorer internal plugin is not loaded, therefore it cannot be patched
ast.target: 文件资源管理器内部插件未加载，因此无法修补

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 附件文件夹重命名成功。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Attachment folder could not be found at the given location.
ast.target: 在给定位置找不到附件文件夹。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move file to vault as linked attachment
ast.target: 将文件移动到保险库作为链接附件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy file to vault as linked attachment
ast.target: 将文件复制到保险库作为链接附件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure the import options and then press either enter or the import button.
ast.target: 配置导入选项，然后按回车键或导入按钮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How do you want to proceed?

ast.name: text
ast.source: You intended to move the file. 					However, moving a file that is already in the vault to a new 					destination in the same vault is not supported; 					only copying and linking operations are allowed.
ast.target: 您打算移动文件。但是，不支持将已在保险库中的文件移动到同一保险库中的新目标；仅允许复制和链接操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do you want to make a copy or refer to the original file in the vault through a relative path?
ast.target: 您是想创建副本，还是通过相对路径引用保险库中的原始文件？

ast.name: text
ast.source: ${original} for the original name (omitting file extension) of the imported attachment files
ast.target: ${original} 表示导入附件文件的原始名称（省略文件扩展名）

ast.name: text
ast.source: ${notename} for the name of the MarkDown note into which the attachment files will be imported
ast.target: ${notename} 表示将导入附件文件的 Markdown 笔记的名称

ast.name: text
ast.target: ${uuid} 表示 128 位通用唯一标识符

ast.name: text
ast.source: ${md5} for a MD5 hash of the imported file
ast.target: ${md5} 表示导入文件的 MD5 哈希值

ast.name: text
ast.source: Be aware that this setting is a mirror of the corresponding setting in the vault preference pane
ast.target: 请注意，此设置是保险库首选项窗格中相应设置的镜像。
